description_long: This object is a cylindrical beverage can with a pale yellow-green body and a metallic silver top and bottom. The can is decorated with several geometric shapes in varying shades of blue, including circles, squares, and rectangles, distributed around its surface. One side of the can features a standard nutrition facts panel and a barcode, both printed in black. The top of the can has a typical pull-tab opening mechanism, commonly found on soft drink or snack cans. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible brand logos or promotional graphics, and the can's design is minimalistic and modern.
description: A pale yellow-green beverage can with blue geometric shapes, a silver top, and a nutrition facts panel. The design is minimalistic with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the can's pull-tab top, a blue square and circle, and part of a barcode on the lower left.
description_view_1: This view highlights a light blue circle and a blue square, with a large blue rectangle partially visible.
description_view_2: This side displays two large blue rectangles, one dark and one light, and part of the nutrition facts panel.
description_view_3: The back view features the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and a recycling symbol, with blue rectangles on the side.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, fat, sodium, carbohydrates, sugars, and protein.
